title: VPAG 2024: scheme documents and guidance
body: "This collection brings together the following VPAG publications:   summary of the heads of agreement: the terms of the agreement reached between the Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC), NHS England and the Association of the British Pharmaceutical Industry (ABPI) for a new voluntary scheme the full VPAG agreement the annual payment percentage, which sets out the payment due from members of VPAG  decisions of the VPAG dispute resolution panel   There are separate collections on:    VPAG operational review minutes (minutes of meetings held between the government, NHS England and ABPI about how VPAG is operating) VPAG quarterly net sales and payment information   "

taxons.title: Manufacturing, wholesaling, importing and exporting medicines
